reason: Package 1 of the UI/UX consolidation approved in UI-UX-SPEC.md (see the project's DECISIONS.md, 2026-07-12). This package makes Palette the single source of colour: it adds the shared feedback roles Success/Warning/Danger/Info and routes every previously hard-coded brush (drop badges, toast/shortcut backdrop, digit-badge text, editor Firebrick/Gray/borders, settings preview) through those roles so the wheel, dialogs, menus and tray read as one program. It is a colour-token refactor: layout, composition and behaviour are unchanged, and target colours are chosen to stay visually close to the originals apart from the deliberate consistency fixes (semantic drop-badge colours, theme-aware toast). The genuinely re-drawn parts of the overhaul (dialog family, tile indication, wheel layout) come in later packages and will carry their own design evidence rather than lean on this waiver. This waiver covers only the files this colour-token package touches.
approvedBy: Ivan Larin (repo owner) via chat request on 2026-07-12
